CustomField.description: Engine thrust for this LIfe Limit record. System will take Default Limit on the LLP Template level if could not find Life Limit for the specific Thrust on the Limit Catalog level
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Engine thrust for this LIfe Limit record. System will take Default Limit on the LLP Template level if could not find Life Limit for the specific Thrust on the Limit Catalog level
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_2211_Thrust
